title: Realm Codex
description: Realm Codex adds cosmetic icons and UI for visual warnings and roleplay, made solely for use in my personal modpack.
body:
# 📜 **Realm Codex**

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Beta%200.1-orange) ![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Forge%201.20.1-blue)

---

## 🌟 **Overview**

**Realm Codex** adds purely cosmetic icons and UI for visual warnings, environmental cues, and roleplay flavor. It’s made solely for use in my personal modpack but released here for others to enjoy. New icons and UI elements will be added in future updates to expand the variety.

---

## 📊 **Content Overview**

| **Category**        | **Current Content**            | **Planned Features**                   |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------ | -------------------------------------- |
| 🎨 **Status Icons** | `Custom cosmetic effect icons` | `More themed icon sets in each update` |

---

## ⚙️ **Technical Details**

### **Requirements**

```markdown
✔️ Minecraft: 1.20.1
✔️ Loader: Forge Only
```

---

## 📝 **Development Notes**

> Cosmetic-only mod, no gameplay effects, just immersive visuals.
> Updates will slowly add more icon designs over time.
